thag6.6:1.1: Twenty five years since my going forth, and no peace of awareness
thag6.6:2.1: Having gained no oneness of mind,
thag6.6:2.4: I ran amok from my dwelling—
thag6.6:3.1: “Or… or shall I take the knife?
thag6.6:3.2: What’s the use of life to me?
thag6.6:3.3: If I were to renounce the training,
thag6.6:3.4: what sort of death would I have?”
thag6.6:4.2: I sat down on a bed.
thag6.6:4.4: placed ready to cut my own vein,
thag6.6:5.1: when apt attention arose in me,
thag6.6:5.4: disenchantment stood at an even keel:
thag6.6:6.1: With that, my heart was released.
thag6.6:6.3: The three knowledges have been attained;
